feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to enter a negative amount in the net amount on a purchase order document
entry.content:
On Sales order document it is possible to enter a negative amount for the net amount, but we are looking for a way to enter a negative amount for the net amount on purchase order document as well as on sales order document.

--- Steps to Reproduce ---
1) Access the application "Create Purchase Order Advanced".
2) Enter the supplier and material.
3) Enter the amount to be minus.
4) Net amount is automatically calculated.
5) Error messages appear as shown on the screen.

However, an error occurred when a negative amount was entered for the net amount in the registration of a purchase order document...
See the screenshot below.

Is it possible to enter a negative amount for the net amount on the purchase order document?
If it is possible to enter a negative amount, please let me know the solution.
(I consulted the community, blogs, etc., but could find no compelling information..)

entry.title: Fiori Launchpad designer does not work with 403 forbidden error
entry.content:
Attempt to access Fiori Launchpad Designer for viewing Config file which has been deployed in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition System?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Special Stock Batch Determination for consignment issue with reference of consignment fill up Order
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

Our business scenario is as below:

 

We are running production order against consignment sales as this is make to order as per the customer specifications. As production order is getting reserved against special stock for consignment fill up, we are unable to determine the batch, as the system considers only unrestricted stock.

 

Also, it will be not best practice to determine the batch at the consignment fill up order, as the production team will produce stock against order, so as per process batch should be determined at the delivery level. With reference to consignment fill up order, we will create consignment issue, where same batch should be determined for the consumption.

 

How to handle batch determination from consignment fill up to consignment issue, where same batch should be determined throughout the process which has been generated by production team against consignment fill up order.

entry.title: Purchase Order Item is not matched to Invoice Item in Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
Dear all,

i understand from note 3540020 that it is possible to match a invoice against a purchase order in Central Invoice Management (even if there is no PO number on the invoice), if the description, quantity, unit price & currency matches. However when i tried it out the system does not select a purchase order but tries to book it without a PO assignment. 

Here is the purchase order line item:

And here is the invoice:

I have activated the enhanced invocie item matching:

But the system still does not assign the Purchas Order to the Invoice.

Does anyone have any ideas as to why this might be?

Thanks and best regards

Niklas

entry.title: Comparing depreciation areas
entry.content:
Hi experts!

Is there a way to view the difference in both posted and planned values between two or more depreciation areas? In my case I want to see the difference between depreciation area 1 (Book Depreciation) and 15 (Local Tax) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

I have tried using the reports listed below, but the problem is that you can only filter out one of the depreciation areas at a time. Therefore, no comparison is possible.

- Asset Balances
- Asset History Sheet
- Depreciation Lists
- Asset Transactions

A current workaround is to do an Excel-export for a report containing the depreciation for area 1, another report for area 15 and then merge the two Excel-files. With that said, I want to be able to do this comparison directly in the system.

Your guidance on this would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Is it possible to get a TR list from Import Collection app?
entry.content:
Dear SAP, 

 

I would like to export the list of Transport Requests that are shown in Import Collection app. Is this possible?

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Contract-Based Revenue Recognition
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

We are currently working on implementing Contract-Based Revenue Recognition (CBRR), based on Scope Item 3L3 (Contract Accounting - Contract-Based Revenue Recognition). As prerequisites of this scope item, we also are considering the following scope items mentioned in the test script:

  • 2AR: Contract Accounting - Master Data and Basic Functions
  • 2T3: Convergent Invoicing - Recurring and One-Off Items
  • 3KK: Contract-Based Revenue Recognition - IFRS 

    Our issue is regarding Provider Contracts, mainly with step 4.1.4 ("Create Provider Contract via API") of Scope Item 2AR Test Script. It appears that creating a provider contract directly within S/4HANA Cloud may not be possible without involving an external system. It seems we can only have provider contracts to be created via API or they should be replicated as Provider contracts via Subscriptions from Subscription Billing Tenant.

    Could you kindly confirm the following points:

    1. Is it mandatory to have a provider contract from an external system to implement CBRR in S/4HANA Cloud?
    2. Do you confirm if there is any way to create a provider contract directly within the S/4HANA Public Cloud?
    3. Can Contract-Based Revenue Recognition be used for contracts created entirely within S/4HANA Public Cloud without the need for external systems?
    4. Is the Contract-Based Revenue Recognition scenario only designed to work with external interfaces?

      Thanks,

      Joana

entry.title: Public Cloud - Consume local service/API in ABAP code
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a situation where we need to create a Sales Order using ABAP code in a Public Cloud system. We are not able to use the standard BO because the payment plan entities (which we need) are not available in I_SALESORDERTP, so the only solution we found is to use the api API_SALES_ORDER_SRV.

We tried building a solution following this tutorial:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-outbound-call.html

But we weren’t able to make it work since I believe the tutorial is missing the communication arrangement part, which is needed to handle the connection.

We then followed the 2nd part of the tutorial:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-basic-auth.html

Which is working and creating the sales order as expected, but the problem is that is creating it with the communication user as the owner (CreatedBy field).

Is there a way to consume the API o the odata service associated in a local mode using the same user that is logged into the system? In our process the creator of the order is very important and we can’t have the communication user as creator of every sales order in the system.

Thanks and regards!

entry.title: Not saving Work Center Capacity in alternate Unit of LB
entry.content: Need Work Center Capacity in LB  for Capacity scheduling/Leveling (in addition to Base unit of Time),  being calculated but not being saved.

entry.title: Automation requirement on material document creation with 501 movement type for Non-valuated materia
entry.content:
We want to activate a flexible or custom workflow in Public Cloud for Material doc creation with 501 movement type for non valuated material automatically from a custom table where the non-valuated material list are to be maintained.

My Workflow configuration criteria are as below:

Trigger event: Set the workflow to trigger on the completion of a "261" movement type posting.

Condition check: Within the workflow, include some condition to only proceed if the material is classified as "non-valuated" and others may come because the workflow will have to trigger against only 261 movement type (reservation of PM order)

Action: If the condition is met, the workflow should automatically create a new "501" goods receipt document for the same material quantity with the reference Non-valuated material maintained in a custom table.

The entire development is required on Public Cloud, so please let us know how the BADI or any API functionality along with how we can automate this.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Configuration to Activate the Internal Number Range For Automatic Batch in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content: We have an requirement for the Automatic Batch generation in SAP. We have checked all the Batch related configurations but we did not find any Activation tab for Internal Number Range Assignment for Batches.

entry.title: How to Configure Serial Number Profile for Mandatory GR and Optional GI
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to configure a Serial Number Profile to meet the following requirements:

  1. During goods receipt (GR) for purchase orders, it should be mandatory to enter a serial number.
  2. During goods issue (GI) for production orders (e.g., issuing components to a production order via MIGO), entering a serial number should be optional.

In particular, I would like to configure the system so that serial number entry is required for purchasing-related movements but optional for production-related movements.

Could anyone guide me on how to set up the Serializing Procedure in the Serial Number Profile to achieve this?

Best regards.

entry.title: interpretation algorithm 029 (Payment Order Number) - not clearing automatically
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have encountered an interesting issue related to Electronic Bank Statements (EBS) and automatic clearing in SAP. Supplier payments are not cleared automatically and instead end up in the APP: Reprocess Bank Statement Items.

The interpretation algorithm in use is 029 (Payment Order Number). When the reference in the memo line is not adjusted within the Reprocess Bank Statement Items app, the system allocates two invoices: one correct and one incorrect, with the incorrect invoice even belonging to another company code.

However, if we adjust the memo line and only retain the payment order before reallocating the open item, only the correct invoice is assigned.

Detailed Scenario:

  • In the memo line, the amount of the correct invoice (869 SEK) is included.
  • The incorrect invoice (belonging to a different company code) has "869" as the payment order.
  • It appears the system interprets the amount (869 SEK) as the payment order, which doesn’t align logically, as the incorrect invoice belongs to another company code.

Invoices:

  • Correct Invoice: Amount = 869 SEK, Payment Order = 688
  • Incorrect Invoice (Different Company Code): Amount = 35,037.52 SEK, Payment Order = 869

This issue requires manual adjustment of the memo line to correctly allocate items, which can be time-consuming and inefficient in the long run, particularly if such cases occur frequently.

Additionally, this issue seems somewhat related to SAP Note 3413102 - Algorithm 029 Payment Order (PYORD) for Several Accounts, but there are differences in the scenarios, and the note does not apply to SAP Cloud.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue with interpretation algorithm 029?

I would greatly appreciate any insights or solutions.

entry.title: How to Get custom CDS view in Custom field in F4 value help
entry.content:
Hi team, 

I am trying to add a custom field in EPPM projects with F4 value type. It's Picking a data from std CDS view. 

I have published a custom CDS view. And I want my custom filed to pick my newly published CDS view. 

Can I know is it possible and how we can implement.

entry.title: How SAP Public Cloud Customize MRP Logic?
entry.content:
Hello, Experts

My client has a requirement that they want some of their unplanned orders to be excluded from MRP calculations because they use MTS and independent demand to manage production, and unplanned orders for R&D interfere with their management of supplies.

Of course, the first option is the MRP area feature, but given that they have not enabled it and that setting it up at this point may result in increased maintenance costs for the material data later on, they would like to consider being able to modify the MRP logic so that it doesn't run specific types of orders.

I know that it is possible to make changes to the MRP logic in S4 or ECC, but I haven't found a way to do so in the public cloud version, so I would like to ask the experts here if it is possible to implement this change and if so how should I do it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Bank Account number is truncated the Custom CDS View.
entry.content:
1. Custom CDS View do not give the correct results for the bank account number.
  2. Truncated bank account number is displayed in the Custom CDS View preview.
  3. Only 18 characters of the bank account number is displayed in the Custom CDS View display.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Error handling of incoming forecast / delivery schedules / JITs from customers in Public Cloud
entry.content:
I did a lot of research in the SAP community, on the process navigator, on the SAP store, but I didn't find any information about how it is planned to handle errors related to incoming forcast and delivery schedules in S/4HANA cloud public edition.

In the automotive business one of the main tasks in the sales departement is managing the incoming delivery schedules (per EDI) related to existing scheduling agreements. Usually you get really a lot of delivery schedules per day and usually there is a lot of issues as well, for instance if there is a mismatch in the cumulative quantities.

There is the message dashboard of the Application Interface Framework but as I understood this monitor is for technical experts, to see if incoming EDI was posted successfully or not. But what I need is a monitor for the sales departement. A monitor that links the incoming EDIs with the scheduling agreements, shows cumulative quantities and other details, compares information in the EDI with the scheduling agreement, let me adopt the info in the EDI or in the scheduling agreement etc.

Is there any monitor that provides the needed functions?

entry.title: Service Entry Sheet remains 'in approval' but should auto approve
entry.content:
We have problem with approval of service entry sheets.
The SES should auto approve but after sending for approval they remain in status 'In Approval' (20) .

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Problem to connect Business Application Studio to S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
I have done a RAP Application (and apparently, it's necessary to go throw BAS to end the Building of the App for the deployment and the end of the process).
I try to connect my system to Business application studio in order to deploy a Rap application to S/4 Public Cloud (and not BTP)

I was following the tutorial Connect SAP Business Application Studio and SAP S/4HANA Cloud System | SAP Tutorials

And in the step 4, I have an error Certificate cannot be saved in Address Book.

I check my roles in Development environment.
We are in 3 system landscape.

Christophe

entry.title: Billing blocks for cancelled deliveries in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with canceled delivery notes. They appear in the billing list - VF04. In order to not be invoiced and use up the fiscal numbers,we tried to use billing blocks on deliveries but they still appear in billing list. How to handle this case in public cloud? Have we any solution like VL_COMPLETE in public cloud?

Thanks in advance
